concerns.text: FR-004 defines inconsistency thresholds (absolute p‑value difference > 0.05 and relative effect‑size difference > 5 %). The specification cites Kohavi et al. 2020 only as a generic “standard practice” without providing empirical or theoretical justification, nor a sensitivity analysis showing how varying these cut‑offs would affect false‑positive/false‑negative rates. This makes the prevalence estimate dependent on arbitrary choices, undermining the methodological soundness of the study.
